why_this_action.summary: The loop had already reset saturated curator and directory lanes with fresh targets, and subinium/awesome-claude-code was the strongest newly discovered fit with a direct maintainer email and a live Agent Orchestration section that does not yet list Ralph Workflow.
shared_findings_used: agents/marketing/logs/adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg movement is the primary success gate
agents/marketing/logs/distribution_reset_targets_latest.json: subinium/awesome-claude-code is a fresh reset target
agents/marketing/logs/market_intelligence_latest.json: preserve Codeberg-first positioning and the four canonical product truths
agents/marketing/outreach-log.md: verified this target had not already been contacted

measurement_window.success_signal: reply, merged listing, or another qualified backlink path that sends evaluators to the Codeberg primary repo
measurement_window.kill_condition: If no reply or inclusion signal arrives by 2026-06-06, retire this target and move to another untouched reset target instead of resending the same pitch.
